calendar.matters:
Petition Of Beneficary For Removal Of Trustee And For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-12-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alvin Buchignani for the Petitioner.

Mr. Buchignani stated that the only connection the trust has with Marin County is the Trustee's Attorney, that the day to day activities were in San Francisco, that the trust administration work was done here and that the legal work was done in Marin. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
